source: curated — live RSS/API aggregation coming in v0.5.0

top_stories.title: DeepMind's AlphaFold3 now predicts protein-DNA interactions at atomic resolution
top_stories.summary: AlphaFold3 extends to all biomolecules including DNA, RNA, and small molecule ligands. Accuracy on protein-nucleic acid complexes reaches 80%+ on CASP-style benchmarks.

top_stories.title: FDA approves first CRISPR-based treatment for sickle cell disease in adults
top_stories.summary: Vertex/CRISPR Therapeutics' exa-cel (Casgevy) gains full FDA approval for sickle cell patients 18+. One-time treatment. 95% of patients free from vaso-occlusive crises at 2 years.

top_stories.title: Moderna's mRNA-4157 cancer vaccine shows 65% reduction in melanoma recurrence at 4 years
top_stories.summary: Phase 3 KEYNOTE-942 data: personalized mRNA cancer vaccine + Keytruda reduced recurrence by 65% vs Keytruda alone. Moderna filing for accelerated approval in US, EU, and Canada.

top_stories.title: Canada's CPHI announces first 5 sequencing hubs — Toronto, Montreal, Vancouver, Calgary, Ottawa
top_stories.summary: The Canadian Precision Health Initiative will sequence 100,000+ genomes across 5 regional hubs. Ontario hub at SickKids/UHN. Quebec hub at McGill/Mila. BC hub at Genome BC.

top_stories.title: DeepSeek V4-Pro-DSpark goes open-source under MIT license — on-prem AI inference for biology
top_stories.summary: DeepSeek releases V4-Pro-DSpark as MIT-licensed open-source inference framework. Designed for air-gapped, auditable deployment. Paired with DeepSpec training repo. First major open-source model competitive with GPT-5.5/Opus 4.7 at 10-13x lower cost.

top_stories.title: AbCellera announces 4 new antibody programs entering Phase 1 — including pan-coronavirus candidate
top_stories.summary: Vancouver-based AbCellera advances 4 programs to clinic: pan-coronavirus antibody, TIGIT immuno-oncology, GPCR target for metabolic disease, and a bispecific for solid tumors. All discovered via their AI antibody platform.

companies_to_watch.name: AbCellera
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: Pan-coronavirus antibody, TIGIT immuno-oncology, GPCR metabolic targets, bispecifics for solid tumors. Partnership with Eli Lilly on COVID antibodies generated $1B+ revenue.

companies_to_watch.name: Deep Genomics
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: AI platform predicts how genetic variants alter RNA splicing. Lead programs in Wilson disease, Stargardt disease, and CNS disorders. 10+ programs in pipeline.

companies_to_watch.name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
companies_to_watch.focus: AI drug discovery via cellular imaging
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: Phenomics platform maps billions of cellular responses to drugs. Lead candidates in cerebral cavernous malformation, NF2, and ovarian cancer. Merged with Exscientia in 2025.

companies_to_watch.name: InSilico Medicine
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: AI-designed INS018_055 for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (Phase 2 complete). 31 programs across fibrosis, oncology, immunology, and aging.

companies_to_watch.name: Benchling
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: Unified platform for molecular biology, protein engineering, and lab automation. Used by 200,000+ scientists. Expanding into AI-native experiment design and automated lab notebooks.

companies_to_watch.name: Mila — Quebec AI Institute
companies_to_watch.what_they_are_working_on: Protein design via geometric deep learning, RNA structure prediction, drug-target interaction, federated learning for multi-hospital clinical data. Yoshua Bengio's lab. 1,200+ researchers.

what_to_look_forward_to.description: American Society of Clinical Oncology. Major immuno-oncology trial readouts expected: Merck's Keytruda in adjuvant NSCLC, BMS's Opdivo+Yervoy combo, and several AI-discovered ADC candidates.

what_to_look_forward_to.event: FDA PDUFA date — donanemab full approval
what_to_look_forward_to.description: Eli Lilly's anti-amyloid antibody donanemab expected to receive full FDA approval for early Alzheimer's. Will compete with Eisai/Biogen's Leqembi in the $15B+ Alzheimer's market.
Largest global biotech partnering event. Boston. AI in drug discovery track expanded 3x from 2025. Keynote: 'AI-native biotech — the companies doing drug discovery without wet labs.'

what_to_look_forward_to.event: CPHI sequencing begins — first 10,000 Canadian genomes
what_to_look_forward_to.description: Canadian Precision Health Initiative begins sequencing at SickKids, McGill, Genome BC, Alberta Children's Hospital, and CHEO. The openclinical-ai substrate is designed to be the open deployment layer for CPHI-trained models.
